steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; update_option('woocommerce_task_list_hidden_lists', array('setup')); update_option('woocommerce_onboarding_profile', array('skipped' => true, 'completed' => true)); update_option('woocommerce_admin_install_timestamp', time()); update_option('woocommerce_admin_onboarding_skipped_tasks', array('products', 'tax', 'shipping', 'payments')); update_option('woocommerce_allow_tracking', 'no'); update_option('woocommerce_default_country', 'US:NY'); update_option('woocommerce_currency', 'USD'); ?>
